campaign.title: Post Your Event
campaign.subject: Got an event coming up? Post it free to 10,000+ locals
campaign.description: Show SMB a sample event for their business and invite them to post it

landing_page.ai_goal: Get user to post their first event

slides.title: Your Event Could Reach Thousands

content.headline: your business, Got an Event Coming Up?
content.subhead: Post it free to 10,000+ people in your city

slides.narration: Hey there, quick question: do you have any events coming up at your business? A sale, a workshop, a special, an open house—anything? Because our events calendar reaches over 10,000 people in your city. And posting is completely free.

slides.title: We Drafted One For You

content.headline: We Created a Sample Event

event_preview.title: Community Open House
event_preview.description: Join us for a special community event

content.note: This is just a suggestion based on your business type. Edit it however you want.

slides.narration: We actually went ahead and drafted a sample event for you. Based on what local businesses typically do, we suggested: Community Open House. This is just a starting point—you can edit the title, date, description, everything. Or create something completely different.

slides.title: Why Events Work

testimonial.quote: Posted a workshop, got 40 RSVPs. Best marketing I've ever done.
testimonial.author: Local Business Owner

slides.narration: Here's why events work so well. On average, events on our calendar get 800 views. 45 people typically save an event to attend later. And events get shared—25 shares on average to friends and family. One business owner told us: 'Posted a workshop, got 40 RSVPs. Best marketing I've ever done.' And it's completely free to post.

slides.title: Event Ideas For You

content.headline: Event Ideas for local Businesses

ideas.example: a thank-you event with refreshments and special offers
a hands-on session showcasing your expertise
a limited-time promotion tied to the season
team up with neighboring businesses for a block event

content.note: Don't overthink it. Even 'Now Booking Appointments' counts as news.

slides.narration: Not sure what to post? Here are ideas that work great for local businesses. Customer Appreciation Day—like a thank-you event with refreshments and special offers. Workshop or Demo. Seasonal Sale Event. Or Community Partnership Event. Don't overthink it. Even something simple like 'Now Booking Appointments for Spring' gives people a reason to engage.

slides.title: Post Your Event

content.headline: Ready to Reach 10,000+ People?

cta_secondary.label: Create My Own Event
cta_secondary.description: Start fresh with your own idea

content.trust: Free forever • Edit anytime • Cancel anytime
content.urgency: Events posted this week get featured in our newsletter

slides.narration: Ready to reach 10,000 people in your city? Click 'Post This Event' to use the one we drafted—you can edit it anytime. Or click 'Create My Own' to start fresh with your own idea. Either way, it's free, you can edit anytime, and events posted this week get featured in our newsletter. Let's get people to your next event.

email_hook.subject: Got an event coming up? Post it free to 10,000+ locals
email_hook.preview_text: We drafted one for your business
email_hook.body:
Hey there,

Quick question: Does your business have any events coming up?

A sale. A workshop. A special. An open house. Anything.

Because our community events calendar reaches over 10,000 people in your city. And posting is completely free.

We actually drafted a sample event for you based on what local businesses typically do:

📅 Community Open House

[SEE YOUR SAMPLE EVENT →]

You can use it as-is, edit it, or create something completely different.

Events posted this week get featured in our newsletter (10,000 subscribers).

Sarah
Fibonacco

P.S. One business owner told us: 'Posted a workshop, got 40 RSVPs. Best marketing I've ever done.' Just saying.

email_reminder.subject: Your event is still waiting to be posted
email_reminder.body:
Hey there,

That sample event we created for your business? Still sitting there, ready to go.

10,000 people could see it. But only if you post it.

Takes about 3 minutes:

[POST YOUR EVENT NOW →]

Free. Editable. Reaches your whole community.

Sarah
